data.title: Positron Corp partners with MedAxiom for cardiovascular solutions. (OTC: POSC)
data.description: In Buffalo, New York on October 2, 2025, Positron Corporation, a prominent company in molecular imaging technology focusing on PET and PET-CT imaging systems and clinical services, disclosed a collaboration with MedAxiom. MedAxiom is renowned in the cardiovascular field as the top provider of organizational performance solutions. Positron, trading under OTC symbol POSC, is excited about this partnership.

data.title: PharmAla sends first domestic shipment of LaNeo™ MDMA to Johns Hopkins, while issuing shares as debt payment.
data.description: PharmAla successfully carried out its inaugural shipment of MDMA within the United States from its recently established domestic distribution center. Additionally, the company has announced the issuance of shares as a means of settling debt.

data.title: SEALSQ CEO to keynote "AI Meets Quantum, Building Unbreakable Post-Quantum Security" at IQT Summit in NY on Oct 20. CEO Roundtable with Rigetti, ORCA, SEEQC, & Arqit CEOs.
data.description: In Geneva, Switzerland on October 2, 2025, SEALSQ will join the "Panel 8: CEO Roundtable" for a discussion alongside top executives from Rigetti, ORCA, SEEQC, and Arqit. This event brings together significant figures from various companies in the industry for a comprehensive dialogue.

Sweden PM: ‘Appalled and saddened by reports of an attack at a synagogue in Manchester, in which several people were killed and injured. The fact that this happened during the observance of the Jewish holiday Yom Kippur makes it all the more horrific. My thoughts are with all

data.title: Bitcoin Depot acquires National Bitcoin ATM assets, adding 527 kiosks in 27 states, expanding U.S. presence.
data.description: The recent acquisition has resulted in Bitcoin Depot expanding its reach significantly, bringing its total number of kiosks to 527 across 27 states. This development not only bolsters the company's national presence but also enhances the availability and accessibility of its services to a wider customer base.

data.title: Debut poetry collection "What Love Leaves Behind" by Karen Hansen released by Pine & Sea press, transforming grief into universal connection.
data.description: In Washington on October 2, 2025, Karen Hansen's first poetry collection, titled "What Love Leaves Behind," was published by Pine & Sea press. The release coincided with her father's birthday, adding a poignant layer to the significance of the work. Delving into universal themes of love, memory, and connection, Hansen's collection provides readers with a heartfelt exploration of these emotions. The exact number of poems and pages in the collection was not provided in the news snippet.

Zelenskyy: ‘had a meeting with President of the European Commission António Costa, and Prime Minister of Denmark Mette Frederiksen We focused discussions on supporting Ukraine’s European integration and opening the first cluster together

data.title: TV shows, incl. "South Park," continue to mock crypto. Bitcoin remains a cultural punchline with its rise in popularity.
data.description: The latest episode of "South Park" continues its tradition of poking fun at the world of cryptocurrency, specifically highlighting Bitcoin. This popular digital asset has often been the subject of jokes in popular culture.

data.title: Melania Trump endorses meme coin amid $10M team selling controversy with 98% price drop after.
data.description: A video featuring US First Lady Melania Trump promoting the MELANIA token has sparked controversy, with concerns raised over team token sales amounting to $10 million and a significant 98% decrease in the token's price.
SOUTH AFRICA SAYS US-TRADE TALKS MAY START IN COMING WEEKS

data.title: Asia's top digital wealth management platform, Amber Premium, joins S&P Global BMI. Listed under Nasdaq as AMBR.
data.description: In New York on October 2, 2025, Amber International Holding Limited, known as Amber Premium and listed on Nasdaq as AMBR, emerged as Asia's top digital wealth management platform. The company is celebrated for its innovative technology and unique offerings in digital assets.

data.title: Communify upgrades MIND AI Stories Suite with personalized narrative experiences powered by client data.
data.description: In Los Angeles, technology company Communify has revealed the expansion of its main product, MIND AI Stories, to now integrate in-depth client-specific information.

data.title: Paragon Legal and Mitratech AdvanceLaw surveyed 150 in-house legal leaders to help GCs demonstrate value to the C-suite.
data.description: A recent study conducted by Paragon Legal in collaboration with Mitratech AdvanceLaw surveyed 150 senior in-house legal leaders. The survey, conducted in San Francisco on October 2, 2025, explored ways in which General Counsels (GCs) can redefine the discussion on value with the C-suite. Paragon Legal, known for its innovative provision of adaptable legal professionals, delved into key insights from the survey to understand and improve interactions between legal leaders and the executive team.

data.title: Wrike appoints András Horváth as Head of AI to accelerate enterprise AI momentum, focusing on delivering practical results.
data.description: In San Diego, today Wrike, a leading intelligent work management platform, named András Horváth as Head of AI. This move demonstrates Wrike's dedication to integrating reliable AI into all processes and expediting its use on a large scale in enterprises. Thomas Scott, CEO of Wrike, emphasized the focus on achieving tangible outcomes rather than conducting mere AI trials. With András spearheading AI product strategy, Wrike aims to make AI more than just a buzzword and deliver concrete benefits to its users.

data.title: President Trump sees the shutdown as a chance for deep cuts, aiming to reduce spending in "Democratic agencies" after a meeting with the White House budget chief.
data.description: The president is scheduled to have a meeting with the White House budget chief in order to reduce funding for what he referred to as "Democratic agencies."

data.title: Everlywell introduces AI health platform Eva for personalized health insights, combining intelligence with engaging tools.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Everlywell, a prominent digital health company, has revealed the introduction of Eva, an innovative AI-driven platform. This technology transforms intricate biomarker information into clear and personalized health insights. Eva utilizes its intelligence alongside interactive resources to provide support and encouragement for individuals to make significant health decisions. Serving as an intelligent health assistant, Eva offers tailored guidance and valuable suggestions to enhance crucial interactions during the healthcare process. The platform aims to empower individuals to take proactive steps towards improving their well-being.

data.title: Tesla's car sales increase by 7% amidst a spike in U.S. EV demand post the $7,500 tax credit cut-off.
data.description: The corporation saw a boost in sales due to an increase in demand for electric vehicles in the United States, following the termination of a $7,500 incentive by Republican lawmakers at the close of September. However, several other automakers experienced higher benefits from this situation compared to the company.

SUPREME COURT ALLOWS COOK TO STAY AT FED FOR NOW - SEMAFOR

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs attract $676M amid BTC surpassing $119K, fueled by expectations of a U.S. interest rate reduction.
data.description: According to analysts interviewed by Decrypt, the anticipation of a potential decrease in U.S. interest rates may be prompting an increase in investments into Bitcoin ETFs.
